name: on-war-vol-1
description: Carl von Clausewitz's foundational work on military strategy — the nature of war, the trinity, war as politics, friction, fog, and the center of gravity. Essential reading for strategy, leadership, and conflict understanding.
useCase: Understand the fundamental nature of war and conflict, strategic principles, and how political objectives guide military action.
knownRisks: 19th century prose can be dense and difficult
Some concepts have been misinterpreted by later readers
Written before modern warfare technology — needs thoughtful application
